plansAndPricingDescription: Create, edit, and manage subscription plans. Changes are previewed in real-time.
editPlanDescription: Configure plan details, pricing, and features.
livePreviewDescription: This is how your pricing page will appear to users.
unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Click "Save & Publish" to apply.
noPlanSelectedDescription: Select a plan from the list above to edit its details, or create a new one.
newPlanCreated: New plan created. Fill in the details.
featureAdded: Feature added. Fill in the details.
allPlansSaved: All plans saved successfully! Pricing page updated.
validationFailed: Validation failed: {{count}} error(s) found. Please fix them.
deletePlanDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this plan? This action cannot be undone. All associated features and pricing data will be permanently removed.
removeFeatureDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this feature from the plan? This will affect how the plan is displayed to users.
noFeaturesYet: No features yet. Click "Add Feature" to get started.
